title: Ten Years of Landscape Genomics: Challenges and Opportunities.
author: Li Y Zhang XX Mao RL Yang J Miao CY Li Z Qiu YX
content: S-EPMC5733015 PMC5733015 Ten Years of Landscape Genomics: Challenges and Opportunities. Landscape genomics is a relatively new discipline that aims to reveal the relationship between adaptive genetic imprints in genomes and environmental heterogeneity among natural populations. Although
